Ussel.note: Route entry point at km ~182.5, not Ussel city centre (which is ~2.5 km north of the route at 45.5457, 2.3119). Stage 9 finishes at Place Voltaire in Ussel proper.

Côte de Miel.note: Summit coordinate updated 2026-05-03 to match the v1.4.8 points-config correction (climb is the small bump at km 56.54, not the older km 49 characterization). Verified via processing/audit_segment_data.py.

Côte des Naves.note: Summit coordinate updated 2026-05-06 (issue #477) to the polyline position at the points-config summit km 76.59. Old coord was identical to the Naves town centre (45.312319, 1.7666474) — that placed it at km 78.19 / segment 12 / 374m off route, which was wrong. Audit-trail: the elevation profile peak is at km 77.32 (424m); CLAUDE.md gradient 6.7% matches the elevation-derived 6.8%; points-config gradient 5.6% diverges and is flagged for follow-up.

Puy de Lachaud.note: Summit coordinate updated 2026-05-06 (issue #477) to the polyline position at the points-config summit km 87.54. Old coord (45.336, 1.784) sat at km 81.49 / segment 12 / on a descent — diverged from the points-config km by 6 km. Per publisher decision, coord aligned to points-config km. Caveat: Puy de Lachaud is not on the official ASO 2026 Stage 9 categorised-climb list (Côte des Naves, Suc au May, Côte de la Croix de Pey, Mont Bessou); follow-up may revisit whether the climb stays in points-config.
